final:
module parity_generator (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [2:0] data,
    output reg parity);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        parity <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        parity <= data[0] ^ data[1] ^ data[2];
    end
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      parity <= ~data[0];
    end
  end

endmodule
